offer_name: Missed Call Rescue Desk for HVAC

audience.primary: Owner-led or dispatcher-led HVAC service businesses
best_fit: frequent missed calls during peak or after-hours periods
wants revenue before buying custom software

positioning: A done-for-you, human-backed service that uses AI assistance to recover missed inbound HVAC calls and convert them into booked jobs.
core_promise: Respond quickly to missed inbound calls with AI-assisted SMS and callback workflows that recover leads, qualify demand, and push customers toward booking.
included: Callback attempts for urgent or high-intent leads
risk_reversal: Continue at no charge until launch workflow is live if agreed launch window is missed
Apply part of the pilot fee toward a future month or automation work if participation is strong but no meaningful recovery activity is created
why_this_first: Easy for HVAC owners to understand
Creates data and workflow insight for future automation
scope_boundaries: Use existing scheduling workflow where possible
Avoid deep integrations in version one
Do not promise fully autonomous booking initially
sales_assets: Short proof narrative or beta story
recommended_offer: Sell a 30-day Missed Call Rescue Desk for HVAC pilot: a done-for-you, AI-assisted, human-backed service that rapidly follows up on missed inbound calls, qualifies opportunities, and hands off bookable jobs to the HVAC company's existing team.
